scripts.test: pnpm workspace:check && pnpm toolchain:check && turbo run test && cargo nextest run --workspace
scripts.lint: pnpm workspace:check && biome check . && turbo run typecheck && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.governance:check: node scripts/check-licenses.mjs && node scripts/check-dco.mjs --self-test && node scripts/check-affiliation.mjs
scripts.coverage: pnpm coverage:ts && pnpm coverage:rust && node scripts/check-coverage.mjs
scripts.licenses:audit: node scripts/check-js-licenses.mjs && cargo deny check licenses bans sources
